meta.footEn: Data snapshot: 2026-07-10 · Garmin fenix 8 via Freddy

en.c5d: computed from sleep, HRV, RHR, stress & recent load
en.rec: A strong recovery morning to close the week: 8h27 at score 83 off a 22:05 bedtime — the longest and one of the best nights of the window, 1h21 over the 7-day average (7h06). The autonomic picture rebounded after the midweek dip: HRV climbed back to 40 (+8 from the previous night, right on the 7-day baseline of 41) and RHR dropped to 54 (−3 vs yesterday, back to the weekly average). Morning stress is very calm at 17. The stage mix was light-heavy — 5h18 of light sleep — with deep at 1h26 and REM recovering to 1h43; 28 minutes awake. Nights are labeled by the evening they start, so this one sits under Thu 9 (Thursday–Friday). Readiness is good — the body has clearly absorbed the training week. Friday is a planned rest day, so there is nothing to push against: let the legs recover from yesterday's squat session ahead of Saturday's trap-bar deadlift.

hr.c5d: izračunato iz sna, HRV-a, RHR-a, stresa i opterećenja
hr.rec: Snažno jutro oporavka za kraj tjedna: 8h27 uz ocjenu 83 i lijeganje u 22:05 — najduža i jedna od najboljih noći u prikazanom razdoblju, 1h21 iznad 7-dnevnog prosjeka (7h06). Autonomna slika se oporavila nakon pada sredinom tjedna: HRV se popeo natrag na 40 (+8 u odnosu na prethodnu noć, točno na 7-dnevnoj osnovici od 41), a RHR pao na 54 (−3 vs jučer, natrag na tjednom prosjeku). Jutarnji stres vrlo miran, 17. Struktura sna bila je bogata laganim snom — 5h18 — uz duboki san od 1h26 i REM oporavljen na 1h43; 28 minuta budnosti. Noći se bilježe prema večeri kojom počinju, pa ova stoji pod Čet 9 (četvrtak–petak). Spremnost je dobra — tijelo je očito apsorbiralo trenažni tjedan. Petak je planiran dan odmora, pa nema što forsirati: neka noge otpočinu od jučerašnjeg treninga čučnja prije subotnjeg trap-bar mrtvog dizanja.
